tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 江有汜，之子歸，不我以，不我以，其後也悔。 江有渚，之子歸，不我與，不我與，其後也處。 江有沱，之子歸，不我過，不我過，其嘯也歌。

Our lady, ^vhen she was married, Would not employ us. She would not employ us; But afterwards she repented.
2 The Keang has its islets. Our lady, when she was married, Would not let. us be with her. She would not let us be with her； But afterwards she repressed [such feelings].
3 The Keang has the T4o. Our lady, when she was married, Would riot come near us She would not come near us; But she blew that feeling away, and sang.
